授業目的: This class aims to extend communication skills in English through extensive practice in speaking and listening. Further aims of this class include development of intercultural knowledge. Key areas of the course are focused on developing an ability to express opinions and thoughts about life, experiences and society. The main objective is that students will improve their confidence in communicating in English.
到達目標: 1. To develop communicative and pragmatic competence in English at an intermediate to advanced level.2. To gain practical experience using English appropriately in a variety of social situations especially in relation to expressing opinions and reflections about life, experiences and society.3. To achieve greater intercultural understanding and competence in using English.
授業方法: Course format is face-to-face and focuses on speaking, listening and critical thinking through active communication. Students who take this course are expected to actively participate in communication activities. All activities in class will involve pair work and group discussions.

成績評価Grading6: 備考　Note 1. Prerequisites: Taking the TOEIC test in May (1年生) or in December (2年生) required by KGU is the prerequisite for credit earning.2. Absences: 4 absences are considered excessive and result in automatic failure. 3. Tardiness: Coming into the classroom after the bell is considered tardiness. Arrival after 30 minutes is considered an absence. 2 tardy arrivals equal 1 absence. (Being late is not considered tardiness in case of documented delay of public transportation.)4. Make-up Assignments: Make-up assignments will not be given except in cases of documented medical necessity or family emergency. 5. Cheating: Cheating on any quizzes, tests, projects, or assignments results in zero point on the work.
備考Note0: 1. Classroom Participation: Leaving a classroom without asking for permission, doing something else that than class activities, or sleeping are considered an absence. 2. AI-based Tools: Aside from the usefulness of Artificial Intelligence (AI) content generators, using an AI-based tool (such as ChatGPT, DeepL Translate, and Google Translate) to complete your coursework without proper authorization is a form of academic dishonesty. It violates academic standards of Kansei Gakuin University. Thus, completing assignments and exams by using an AI-based tool is regarded cheating, which will result in a score of zero points on any coursework. 3. Portrait Rights and Copyrights: Taking a photo of the instructor, classmates, and any class material (like handouts, quizzes, and tests) and sharing it with somebody without permission is the violation of the portrait rights and copyrights.

備考　Note
1. Prerequisites: Taking the TOEIC test in May (1年生) or in December (2年生) required by KGU is the prerequisite for credit earning.
2. Absences: 4 absences are considered excessive and result in automatic failure. 
3. Tardiness: Coming into the classroom after the bell is considered tardiness. Arrival after 30 minutes is considered an absence. 2 tardy arrivals equal 1 absence. (Being late is not considered tardiness in case of documented delay of public transportation.)
4. Make-up Assignments: Make-up assignments will not be given except in cases of documented medical necessity or family emergency. 
5. Cheating: Cheating on any quizzes, tests, projects, or assignments results in zero point on the work.
